---
title: "Interactive Scalable Table"
format: html
css: custom.css
---


## *Data-driven*

```{r}
library(gt)
library(dplyr)

# Sample data
head(mtcars) %>% 
  gt() %>% 
  opt_interactive(
    use_page_size_select = TRUE,
    use_sorting = TRUE,
    use_search = TRUE
  )
```

```{r}
head(mtcars) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_options(quarto.disable_processing = TRUE)
```
